sourceNotes: Kerala 2006 scenario split news items (2006-01 to 2010-12)

newsItems.title: Munnar Encroachment Demolition Drives Launched by VS Government (2006-01)
newsItems.description: CM VS Achuthanandan sends special task forces to demolish illegal luxury resorts constructed on forest land. In Kerala, this monthly event shapes key state development debates.

reactionOptions.text: Initiate a special government commission to resolve munnar_evictions issues immediately.

risk.badOutcome: Administrative delays stall the commission, drawing minor local criticism.

reactionOptions.text: Demand that the government address munnar_evictions concerns and provide public subsidies.

risk.badOutcome: Discussions break down due to partisan standoffs, leading to minor public fatigue.

reactionOptions.text: Propose a joint multi-party round table to build consensus on munnar_evictions.

risk.badOutcome: Radical subgroups refuse to cooperate, causing minor delays.

reactionOptions.text: No comment.

newsItems.title: SmartCity Kochi IT Project Joint Venture Agreement Signed (2006-02)
newsItems.description: The state cabinet signs the final joint venture agreement with Dubai Internet City for the long-delayed IT park. In Kerala, this monthly event shapes key state development debates.

reactionOptions.text: Initiate a special government commission to resolve smartcity_kochi issues immediately.

risk.badOutcome: Administrative delays stall the commission, drawing minor local criticism.

risk.badOutcome: Radical subgroups refuse to cooperate, causing minor delays.

reactionOptions.text: No comment.

newsItems.title: Kasaragod Endosulfan Pesticide Ban Agitations Gain Strength (2006-03)

newsItems.title: Vizhinjam Deepwater Port Bid Tenders Cleared (2006-04)
